name: GOLD RESERVE LTD
summary: Gold Reserve Ltd (GDRZF) is a mining company focused on mineral exploration and development. The company is engaged in activities related to gold and mineral properties. Based on its SEC 10-K filing, the company discusses legal proceedings and arbitration matters, suggesting it has faced disputes related to its mining operations and property rights.
